emails.subject: tomorrow
emails.body: John, I got a six hour drive tomorrow, so I was thinking of taking a half day, so I can spend a little more time with my mom. Any objections? Your emissions analyst

emails.subject: RE: tomorrow
emails.body: RE: tomorrow You might as well take the whole day off Not much going on around here enjoy some time with your mother To: Massey II, John

emails.subject: RE: tomorrow
emails.body: Who says that John Massey is not a nice guy? To: Taylor, Michael E
